original: A bright pink box about a yard long, emblazoned with the TamaniCorp logo on either side. The Egg Trainer advertises itself as your one-stop-shop for your oviposition needs. The trainer, as its name suggests, induces artificial pregnancy via inserted eggs that swell to huge sizes, or helps to train your body to take gargantuan loads of alien eggs. Satisfaction guaranteed with every use!
